description: CompositionFuschia pink bomber jacket that has an outer made of 100% polyester, a mesh lining made of 100% polyester, an attached hoodie with laces, zippered placket on the front, zippered insert pockets on the sides, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, vented seam on the upper back where mesh lining is visible and ribbed hemlineFittingComfortWash careMachine was coldWash separately with like coloursDo not use softenersRemove immediatelyDo not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleach, iron or dry cleanLine dryLook on trend in this fuschia pink bomber jacket from nike. The polyester outer and the mesh lining provide good insulation and comfret while the vent on the upper back seam allows for better air-flow. The hood provides better protection from the elements. Wear this with jeans, long sleeve tees and sports footwear when the weather gets chilly.
